title: cineraria abrotanifolius
intro: Cineraria abrotanifolius, also known as Senecio cineraria or Dusty Miller, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Africa and the Mediterranean. The plant is known for its silvery-gray leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Cineraria abrotanifolius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or salves, although its toxicity and potential side effects make it essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
